verses.text: Hong kisusia nailo, mi a susiapa aw, tu-in gimna a ngah ding na hita hi. Kuamah in hong khem nailoh, mi khempa aw, tu-in gimna a ngah ding na hita hi. Na suksiat nawnloh ciangin nang hong kisusia ding a, na khem nawnloh ciangin nang hong kikhem ding hi
Topa aw, kote hong hehpih in; nang kong muang uh hi. A tawntungin kote hong hu in la, lungkham hunin hong honkhia in
Nangma vanging hangin mite tai uh a, nangma thawhtohna hangin minamte kithehthang hi
Tangngol in na a khop bangin amau van kinusiate kaikhawm a, kauphe honpi bangin van tawmin mite phe zaizai hi
A sangna munah teng ahih manin Topa kipahtawi hi. Amah in thutang leh thuman tawh Jerusalem dimsak ding hi
Amah pen nangma hunte a kipna, hotkhiatna a kicin'na, pilna leh theihna hi ding hi. Topa kihtakna pen ama sumgum hi ding hi
En un, galhangte huhna ngenin kiko uh a, kilemna ding palai semte nakpi takin kap uh hi
Lam lianpite gambulak suak a, kuamah khualzinin pai ngam nawnlo uh hi. Thuciamnate kipeksatin, thukimnasate kipalsat a, khatlekhat kizahtakna om nawnlo hi
Leitang kinusiacipin om mawk hi. Lebanon muala tulak singte vulgawp a, Sharon gam lei hoihpen sehnel gam bang ta hi. Bashan leh Karmel muala singtehte pulhmang khinta hi
Topa in minam dangte kiangah, “Tu-in ka gamtang ding a, ka vangliatna ka lak ding hi. Tu-in kei hong kipahtawi ta ding hi
Na geelnate uh a kiman'na omlo a, na nasepnate uh a mawkna ahi hi. No leh no a kisusia na hi uh hi
Leikang ngahna dingin suangkang a kihal bangin na vui suak ding uh a, meikhuk sunga a kihaltum lingkungte na bang ding uh hi,” a ci hi
Gamlapi-a a om mite aw, ka sepna thu za un. A nai-a a om mite aw, ka vangliatna thei un

Zion-a a om mawhnei mite lau uh a, Pasian' thu a ngaihsunlo mite lau-in lingcip uh hi. Amaute in, “Pasian' thukhenna pen a kuang tawntung mei tawh kibang hi. Tua bang meikuang kua in thuakzo ding ahi hiam?” ci uh hi

Thumanin gamta-in thutang na gen uh leh na suakta ding uh hi. Na vangliatna uh mizawngte khemna-in zang kei un la, sumgolh deih kei un. Mi thah ding leh siatna gamtat ding a vaihawmte tawh kipawl kei un
Tua hi leh na tangtung ding uh a, kulh muan'huai mahmah sungah a om bangin lungnuam takin na om ding uh hi. Annek tuidawn na kitasam kei ding uh hi
Tua ciangin a thupi mahmah kumpipa na mu ding uh a, a zai mahmah a gam zong na en ding uh hi
Nidangin na kihtak uh gamdangmi siahdongte, siahkhawmte, thukan mite, na phawk nawn kei ding uh hi
Na theihtheih loh uh, a kitello kampau a zang, na teltheih lohun a pau bualbual, mi kihisakte na mu nawn kei ding uh hi
Pawite i bawlna khuapi Zion en un! Daitakin a kiten'na mun, a khetphimte kidokkhia ngeiloin a khaute a tat ngeilo, a kikhin thei hetlo puanbuk a bang, Jerusalem khuapi, na mu ding uh hi

Tua khuasungah Topa in ama minthan'na vang hong langsak ding a, a zai gunte leh a zai lui geite-ah i teng ding hi. Tua tuite tungah ei hong do ding gal gunkuang hong kihot nawnlo ding a, gal teembaw zong hong pai nawnlo ding hi
Bang hang hiam cih leh Topa pen eite' thukhen, Topa pen eite hong ukpa, Topa pen eite' kumpi ahi hi. Amah in eite hong honkhia ding hi

Gal teembaw khaute kol a, ama omna ding mun sanah gunkuang puan khuam lenkip zolo a, gunkuang puan kizal theilo hi. Tua ciangin galte' neihsate kihawmkeek ding a, khebaite nangawn in van ngah ding uh hi
I gamah a teng mite kuamah in, “Ka ci na hi,” ci nawnlo ding uh a, mawhna khempeuh kimaisak ding hi.
